item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 104 pts (0.45) Tampa Bay Lightning – 102 pts (0.442) Buffalo Sabres – 102 pts (0.436) Montreal Canadiens – 100 pts (0.433) Toronto Maple Leafs – 78 pts (0.338) Florida Panthers – 77 pts (0.333) New York Rangers – 75 pts (0.321) Pittsburgh Penguins – 96 pts (0.41) Boston Bruins – 95 pts (0.406) Ottawa Senators – 90 pts (0.39) Philadelphia Flyers – 90 pts (0.39) New York Islanders – 89 pts (0.38) Detroit Red Wings – 88 pts (0.381) Columbus Blue Jackets – 88 pts (0.381) Washington Capitals – 87 pts (0.372) New Jersey Devils – 83 pts (0.359) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
